title: Create SF Symbols Icon System
description: Build a centralized icon management system using SF Symbols. Create an enum or struct that maps semantic icon names to SF Symbol identifiers. NO EMOJIS, Morty. This is a professional application. Include icons for: terminal, file, folder, git branch, settings, play, stop, etc.
acceptance_criteria: Icon enum/struct with all needed icons
Helper function to get Image from icon name
No emoji usage anywhere in UI
agent_output: Alright Rick, I've built you a proper icon system - no more emoji nonsense, Morty. Here's what's done:
